subcodes.first_line: O Pen of the Most High! Make mention of him who hath tasted the sweetness of communion with his Lord and hath remembered his Master through the fragrances of wondrous love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم الاعلی ذکر الذی ذاق لذیذ مناجات ربه و ذکر مولاه بنفحات حب بدیعا و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transcendence; unknowability of God
